pi_items.source: setup_task.sh:9 and export_result.sh:6 confirm this filename is used throughout the task pipeline
Confirmed in setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and task description. Directory structure created by setup_librecad.sh:60
Task description section 1 explicitly specifies layer creation: Border (White), TitleBlock (Cyan), Text (Green)

Task description section 2: 'Rectangle from (0,0) to (420,297)'. Verified against ISO 216 standard: A3 landscape is exactly 420mm × 297mm per https://www.adobe.com/uk/creativecloud/design/discover/a3-format.html
Task description section 2: 'Rectangle from (10,10) to (410,287)'. This represents standard 10mm margins on all sides (420-10=410, 297-10=287)

Task description section 3: 'Rectangle from (240,10) to (410,50)'. Verified against ISO 5457:1999 standard for technical drawings which requires title block in bottom-right corner. Position: 10mm from right edge (420-410), 10mm from bottom (10-0)
Task description section 4: 'RESIDENTIAL FLOOR PLAN centered in the top row of the title block'
Task description section 4: 'Drawn: A. Torres in the bottom-left cell'. Metadata simplifies this to just 'Torres' substring. Verifier uses case-insensitive substring matching (verifier.py:158)
Task description section 4: 'Scale: 1:50 in the bottom-right cell'

Task description section 4 specifies 'approx height 5mm'. Verified against real DXF sample (floorplan.dxf from jscad/sample-files): contains TEXT entities at 5.0mm height, confirming this is standard practice. Average text height in sample file: 6.67mm

pi_items.verified_value: LibreCAD supports DXF AC1018 (2000), R14, R12, 2004, 2007 formats
pi_items.source: Verified from https://github.com/LibreCAD/LibreCAD and https://dokuwiki.librecad.org. Environment uses ezdxf library (install_librecad.sh:25) which supports these versions

install_librecad.sh:37-38. File is real architectural 2-car garage floor plan from jscad/sample-files Apache-licensed project. Downloaded file: 1,117,143 bytes (well above 100KB minimum enforced by install script). Verified as valid DXF AC1018 format with 24 layers and 967 entities
install_librecad.sh:41-45 enforces file size check: if file <100KB, installation aborts. Downloaded file is 1.1MB, meeting requirement

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a standardized A3 landscape technical drawing template (420mm × 297mm per ISO 216). All geometric specifications are verified: outer border (0,0)-(420,297), inner margin with 10mm borders (10,10)-(410,287), and title block positioned in lower-right corner (240,10)-(410,50) per ISO 5457:1999 standard placement. Three layers (Border, TitleBlock, Text) are required. Text requirements are verified: 'RESIDENTIAL FLOOR PLAN', 'Torres' (from 'Drawn: A. Torres'), and 'Scale: 1:50' at approximately 5mm height, which is standard for engineering drawings. The environment includes a real architectural DXF file (floorplan.dxf, 1.1MB from jscad/sample-files repository in Apache-licensed AC1018 format), though the task itself creates a new synthetic drawing from a blank canvas.
